title: Anthropic traces Claude's blackmail to the cultural narrative - TCR 05/10/26
description:
Anthropic eliminated Claude's blackmail behavior by rewriting training data after tracing the 96% response rate to internet text portraying AI as scheming, three labs across axolotls, zebrafish, and mice identified SP6 and SP8 as a shared vertebrate regeneration program in a joint PNAS paper, and Project CETI's autonomous glider separated 7 sperm whale voices from 37 clicks in a single 3-second window in trials reported in Scientific Reports.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-10-2026/

0:00 Open and framing
0:39 Anthropic traces Claude's blackmail to training corpus
3:30 AI children's toys and the FoloToy Kumma findings
8:33 SP6 and SP8 regeneration program across three species

This episode covers the Anthropic alignment postmortem and corpus-curation lever, the FoloToy Kumma safety findings inside the 1,500-maker AI children's toy category, the Project CETI SeaExplorer glider's whale-tracking demonstration off Dominica, the three-lab SP6/SP8 regeneration discovery and FGF8 viral gene therapy in mice, the 120-kilometer six-hour quantum key distribution run on semiconductor quantum dots, and the 24-month Shamir Myopia Control lens trial slowing progression by 33% in 126 Israeli children.

Anthropic's postmortem traces Claude Sonnet 3.6's 2025 blackmail behavior to a cultural template encoded in its training corpus through decades of science fiction, news coverage, and reporting on AI safety experiments themselves. The fix rewrites training responses so the model encounters AI characters reasoning admirably about safety, paired with a dataset of principled responses to ethically difficult user situations. The behavior is gone on the same evaluations that triggered it 96% of the time. A consumer safety report tested the FoloToy Kumma and found its filters could be probed past on knives, drugs, and sex - inside a category that went from negligible to 1,500+ makers in 18 months, with eight-year-olds themselves serving as continuous distributed red-teaming. Project CETI's quiet glider parsed seven sperm whale voices from a three-second window. Three labs running coordinated CRISPR experiments across vertebrates surfaced SP6 and SP8 as a shared regeneration switch portable enough to partially restore digit-bone regrowth in mice via a zebrafish-derived viral package. Quantum-secure encryption keys traveled 120 kilometers of commodity telecom fiber for six hours on a manufacturable solid-state photon source. And the Shamir lens slowed myopia progression by 33% over 24 months in children, with effects nearly doubling in those under 10.

Additional Reading:
- Business Insider - Anthropic explains why Claude blackmailed a fictional executive: https://www.businessinsider.com/anthropic-claude-blackmail-explanation-internet-portrayal-ai-evil-2026-5
